title: isochilostachya caudata
intro: Isochilostachya caudata, also known as the Asian marsh fern or walking fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Asian medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Isochilostachya caudata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Isochilostachya caudata is prepared for herbal use in various forms, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
